message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

title **Ski Championships\nManagement**

caption Ski Championships Management\nClass Diagram\nBertrand C

header Last updated 15/10/2020

package "Scm" {

class Event {
  - id: int
  - location: string
  - startDate: Date
  - endDate: Date
  + create(): Event
  + update()
  + delete(): bool
  + list(): Event[]
  + export(): bool
  + import(): bool
}

class Result {
  - time: Time
  + create(): Result
  + delete(): bool
  + list(): Result[]
}

class Run {
  - number: int
  - time: Time
  .. Getters and setters ..
  + getId()
  .. Other methods ..
  + create(): Run
  + delete(): bool
}

class Competitor {
  - id: int
  - lastName: string
  - firstName: string
  - birthDate: Date
  - bibNumber: int
  - email: string
  - photo: resource
  + create(): Competitor
  + update()
  + delete(): bool
  + list(): Competitor[]
}

abstract class Metadata {
  # id: int
  # name: string
  # description: string
  # create()
  # update()
  # delete(): bool
  # list(): Metadata
}

class Category {
}

class Profile {
}

Event "1" *-- "takes part" Competitor
Run .. Result : obtains
Run .. Competitor : runs
Competitor "0..n" -- "0..n" Competitor
Competitor "0..n" -- "0..n" Category : belongs to >
Competitor "0..n" -- "0..n" Profile : has >

Category "1" --|> Metadata
Profile "1" --|> Metadata

Event "1" *-down- "0..n" Competitor

}

@enduml
```
